name: deb-autoset
desc: Debian auto-setup (sudo, SSH, IP login banner)

name: deb-autosetRR
desc: Full auto rr stack (install, OMV layout, claim, purge)

name: deb-crafty
desc: Minecraft Server (Crafty Controller) - web-based server manager

name: deb-sleepwithme
desc: Scheduled server shutdown by day and time

name: deb-wakewithme
desc: Wake-on-LAN scheduler - send WOL packets by schedule or on demand

name: deb-manuser
desc: Full user manager: create, delete, rename, sudo, permissions

name: deb-procman
desc: Process and service manager — list, start, stop, restart, enable/disable at boot

name: deb-ombak
desc: OMV backup utility — rsync backups by UUID with scheduling and logging
